data.content: Revised planning note added. The implementation should stay test-only and cover five concrete areas: observable warn-not-reject behavior for unknown TOML/JSON artifact targets via CLI workflow-install stderr assertions, parser fallback precedence between profile-level and state-level outputs, prompt param coverage for output_hint and missing outputs, direct unit tests for resolve_output_specific_sections on branch/live_deployment/None, and runtime StepMetadata variation including output=None. No child knots created. No Playwright/browser work is needed in this knot; reuse the existing CLI Loom prompt-resolution matrix if broader e2e follow-up is requested.
